'''IG-179''' was an [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuard]] in the service of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], IG-179 would later reappear as chief [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] to [[Iron Knight]] [[Luxum (Jedi)|Luxum]].

It was the sole survivor of its model class to see the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Droid-stub}}
